# Riku Lauttia

> Riku Lauttia works at the intersection of AI engineering, software engineering, commercial strategy, and product development.

## Overview

Riku Lauttia builds intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, software, product development, and business.

- Email: riku@lauttia.com
- Website: https://rikulauttia.com/

## Pages

### Homepage
https://rikulauttia.com/
Introduction, selected work, writing, about, and contact.

### Writing
https://rikulauttia.com/writing
Notes on AI, software, systems, and technology.

## Selected work

- Teleste — Software engineering for broadband access-network systems, including scalable components, performance improvements, testing, and CI/CD.
- Since AI — AI community and innovation platform connecting builders, companies, research, and capital through practical technology programs.
- Root — Platform and event concept connecting ambitious technology talent with companies.
- Kolt — Technology focused on automation, operational workflows, and practical software systems.
- Attractor — Production software, AI systems, and automation developed around concrete business needs.

## Focus areas

- AI and machine learning
- Software engineering
- Product development
- Data and cloud systems
- Technology and commercial strategy

## Education

- Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence — Aalto University
